heading: Records and inspection
label: 70911 Records and inspection
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7091136:283., .Aug. 30, 1950, ch. 823, § 1364 Stat. 566The word “records” is substituted for “books and records” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.

children.text: correct and complete records of account;
minutes of the proceedings of its members, board of directors, and committees having any of the authority of its board of directors; and
a record of the names and addresses of its members.

children.heading: .—Inspection
children.label: b .—Inspection
children.text: A member, or an agent or attorney of the member, may inspect the records of the FFA at any reasonable time.
